ADHD.title: Monthly Progress Tracker - ADHD
ADHD.scoring_logic: Sum of values. Lower score indicates improvement.

questions.text: Have you noticed an improvement in your child's ability to focus and complete tasks compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's levels of restlessness or impulsivity compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's ability to organize tasks and plan their day compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's ability to start tasks and reduce procrastination compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's ability to regulate emotions and control reactions compared to last month?

Autism.title: Monthly Progress Tracker - Autism
Autism.scoring_logic: Sum of values. Lower score indicates improvement.

questions.text: Have you noticed an improvement in your child's social interactions compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's communication skills (verbal and non-verbal) compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement regarding repetitive behaviors or restricted interests in your child compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's response to sensory stimuli (sounds, lights, touch) compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's ability to regulate emotions and manage behavioral challenges compared to last month?

Dyslexia.title: Monthly Progress Tracker - Dyslexia
Dyslexia.scoring_logic: Sum of values. Lower score indicates improvement.

questions.text: Have you noticed an improvement in your child's reading ability compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's writing and spelling skills compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's ability to comprehend written texts compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's ability to organize thoughts and tasks compared to last month?
Have you noticed an improvement in your child's self-confidence when reading or writing compared to last month?
